column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a single tulip gently" | TEXT="思いやり" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a pink rose gracefully" | TEXT="温かい心" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding sweet pea softy" | TEXT="優しい思い出" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking affectionately at cherry blossoms" | TEXT="精神の美" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Holding anemone with a slight sad smile" | TEXT="あなたを信じて待つ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling with a ranunculus" | TEXT="晴れやかな魅力" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding freesia warmly" | TEXT="純潔" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Touching mimosa playfully" | TEXT="友情" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a small bouquet" | TEXT="あなたへ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking confused by a mysterious flower" | TEXT="この花言葉は？" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head cute" | TEXT="なんだろう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking it up in a book" | TEXT="辞書で引く" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised at the meaning" | TEXT="えっ！そうだったの" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing awkwardly" | TEXT="勘違いしてた" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out" | TEXT="てへへ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting cheeks slightly" | TEXT="教えてよー" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Winking happily" | TEXT="まあいっか" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a gentle smile" | TEXT="ありがとう"
